parsed_review.summary: CP00-919 is a well-formed descriptor-only RP30 People/HR embedded-HRX API bridge pack (HRApi tail rows x4 + EmployeeApi foundation x5 + LeaveApi foundation x1, RP30.P03.M00.S02-RP30.P03.M02.S01, 10 units, risk A). Verified via read-only inspection: (1) HRX_CP919_PACK_BINDING chains CP00-918->CP00-919->CP00-920 (registry.js:457) and matches the live plan entry (closeout-pack-plan.json:392), the manifest plan_binding_snapshot, the review baseline, and validate-rp30-hrx-people-contract.mjs:250-258; the included units are real in the source ledgers (hrx-weighted-implementation-ledger.json and rp30-people-hr-evidence-detailed-microphases.json). (2) createHrxDomainRows (registry.js:1705) plus HRX_NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION hard-code every runtime/payroll/HR-AI/payload/permission-write/audit-write/product-state/runtime-receipt/real-data/credential flag to false, and the CP919 descriptor (registry.js:4909) sets HRApi/EmployeeApi/LeaveApi domain entities and baseline_decisions to descriptor-only/deferred. (3) validators.js validateHrxCp919HrEmployeeLeaveApiBridgeCoverage/Descriptor and validateHrxPeopleContract (3858-4040) enforce distribution counts, per-section API descriptor and entity_name binding, all no-write/no-runtime/no-real-data flags, capabilities, safety gates, no-leak guards, and contract projection identity. (4) model.test.js:1231-1306 asserts the same boundaries and reads the on-disk contract to confirm CP00-919 is current. (5) contracts/hrx-people-contract.json current_pack/latest_pack/latest_projection are CP00-919 with descriptor HrxCp919HrEmployeeLeaveApiBridgeDescriptor and a complete no_write_attestation/no_leak_guards block (30945-30968). Authority boundary holds: claude_is_final_approval=false and promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false, human approval required for runtime opening, and local validation does not claim enterprise trust. Hermes is used only for the deterministic evidence packet (emits_runtime_receipt=false), not product runtime. Grep across packages/hrx/src found no writeFile/exec/spawn/fetch/network/secret operations. Pack state is honest and non-overclaiming: manifest/command-evidence/construction-inspection/adjudication/claude-review-result all sit at production_ready=false / runtime_ready=false / pending_review, with the six targeted HRX validation commands recorded at exit_code 0. Unrelated dirty files (scripts/progress-control-room-data.mjs, tools/progress-control-room/index.html) are correctly classified as unrelated_dirty_files_preserved in changed-file-scope. No prior invalid review attempts or stale receipt/raw-output exist. One P3 informational note on the deferred full validation ladder. This review is independent read-only input and not final pack/goal approval authority.

findings.title: Full deterministic validation ladder deferred to post-review adjudication
findings.details: command-evidence records only the targeted HRX checks (node --check on registry.js/validators.js/validate-rp30-hrx-people-contract.mjs, node --test packages/hrx/test/*.test.js, rp30:hrx:validate, rp30:validate, hrx:requirements:validate, hrx:weighted:validate), all at exit_code 0, and explicitly defers the full deterministic ladder (closeout-pack-plan:validate, closeout-pack:validate, npm test, validate, spec:requirements:validate, weighted:validate, fullplan:validate, goal:closeout:validate, rp00:control-plane:validate, git diff --check) until review normalization and adjudication. As a read-only reviewer I cannot execute those commands, so the broader ladder is unverified at review time. This is the documented and expected pre-promotion sequence, not a defect: manifest.json, construction-inspection.json, adjudication.md, and claude-review-result.json all correctly remain pending_review / production_ready=false / runtime_ready=false.
findings.recommendation: At closeout, run the full validation ladder, normalize the adjudication/construction-inspection/claude-review-result artifacts from PENDING to the actual verdict, and confirm exactly one valid hardened read-only review receipt with no blocking findings before flipping the hrx_hr_employee_leave_api_bridge_descriptor_verified flag and committing.
findings.post_review_disposition: Accepted as expected pre-promotion state; non-blocking. No code or boundary change required. Closeout automation must still execute the full validation ladder and normalize adjudication/inspection/receipt before promotion.
